title: Strainer Skimmer Spider Ladle Stainless Steel, Kitchen Wire Net Spoon with Handle for Frying Scooping Food, Pasta, Spaghetti, Noodle (Diameter: 5.5inch/14cm, Total Length: 15inch/39cm)
